hero.headline: Read. Explore. No limits.
hero.subheadline: The largest manga, manhwa, and manhua library in your language. Read on any device, anywhere, anytime.

library.title: Vast Library
library.description: Over {count} titles from the biggest names in Asian comics.

updates.title: Daily Updates
updates.description: New chapters every day so you always have something fresh to read.

multiplatform.title: Multi-platform
multiplatform.description: Read on the web, iOS, or Android. Synced across all your devices.

offline.title: Offline Reading
offline.description: Download your favorite chapters and read without an internet connection.

catalog.title: A library that grows every day

gift.title: Gift a loved one
gift.subtitle: Give the gift of unlimited reading.

give.description: Choose a plan and gift someone special with unlimited access to the platform. The gift code will be generated in your account.

items.name: Ana Lima
items.text: Finally a platform that has everything I love and works offline. Perfect for trips!

items.name: Carlos Matos
items.text: The image quality is impressive. I carry my entire collection in my pocket.

items.name: Julia Santos
items.text: I gifted my brother and he loved it. The gift code system is super simple.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
items.answer: Yes. You can cancel anytime from your user dashboard, no hassle.

items.question: Does the daily plan really cost cents?
items.answer: Yes! The daily plan is perfect for testing the platform before committing to a longer plan.

items.question: How does the gift code work?
items.answer: You buy a gift code and send it by email to whoever you want. They use the code to activate the subscription on their account.

items.question: Does it work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes! We have native apps for iOS and Android, plus a responsive web version.

items.question: Can I read offline?
items.answer: Yes. With the app, you can download chapters and read without internet on Monthly and Annual plans.

items.question: How often are new chapters released?
items.answer: Our team updates the library daily with new chapters for ongoing series.

footer_cta.headline: Start reading now
footer_cta.subheadline: Join thousands of readers. First month with satisfaction guarantee.
